Event: The Lapland Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 04/12/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: B4


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Frozen Shooter Bow

When attacking, has a 20-22% chance of dealing 75-90% damage to a group of enemies.

Once in a while, the unit puts up to 3 enemies to sleep. They can't attack or use abilities for 4 sec. Also, the cooldown times of their abilities are increased by 4 sec, and they can't be healed for 4 sec.
The sleeping fighters take 15% less damage. Additionally, the unit's physical pierce is increased by 50%, and with each attack the unit takes additional shots at sleeping enemies for 4 sec. These shots deal critical damage and can't miss their target.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
